overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a lakeshore at sunset. The character wades through shallow water and walks along a sandy beach near a large ruined castle structure, with warm golden hour lighting and atmospheric mist rising from the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow lake with view of ruined castle

events.description: character stops wading and turns to survey the surroundings
character begins turning away from the ruins to walk along the shore

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow lake water while observing the ruined castle on the distant shore

entered.detail: large red-brick castle ruins with broken archways and towers on the distant shore
clear shallow water with visible stones on the lakebed
dense coniferous forest forming the distant horizon
golden-orange sky with scattered clouds reflecting on the water surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt standing in shallow lake water facing a large ruined castle on the distant shore. The golden hour sun casts warm light across the water as the character looks around, then begins turning to walk along the shoreline. The environment is serene and empty, with only the distant forest and castle visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy lakeshore beach with fishing structures

events.description: character turns away from facing the ruins and walks toward the sandy shore
horse comes into view standing on the sandy bank to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shoreline away from the ruins, passing wooden fishing structures in the water

notable_agents.action: brown horse standing still on the sandy shore near the water's edge

entered.detail: golden sandy beach along the water's edge with scattered driftwood
wooden stakes and netting structure extending into the shallow water
distant windmill visible on the horizon beyond the grassy bank
elevated grassy and sandy terrain rising from the shore

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks along the sandy shoreline, moving away from the castle ruins which now appear in the background. The scene features a sandy beach with wooden fishing structures in the water and a grassy bank. A horse stands on the shore to the right, and a distant windmill is visible on the horizon.

events.description: character leaves the sandy beach and re-enters the shallow marshy water
mist rises from the water surface as the character approaches the ruins

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow marshy water toward the ruined castle, navigating around aquatic vegetation

entered.detail: tall reeds and aquatic plants growing in the shallow water near the shore
low-lying fog and mist rising from the water surface near the ruins
intact stone archway of the ruined castle becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the sandy shore and wades back into shallow water, now approaching the ruined castle from a different angle. Marshy vegetation and mist rise from the water as the ruins grow larger in the frame. The stone archways and broken walls of the castle become increasingly prominent as the character walks toward them through the reeds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a serene lakeshore that transitions from a wide vista of distant ruins to an intimate approach of the castle walls. It begins with Geralt standing in shallow water under a warm golden hour sun, gazing across the lake toward a far-off ruined castle before turning to walk along the coast. As he moves, the perspective shifts to a sandy beach featuring wooden fishing structures and a horse on the shore, with a distant windmill appearing on the horizon. The scene then transitions as the character leaves the sand to wade back into the shallow water, where rising mist and marshy vegetation begin to envelop the frame. Finally, the camera closes the distance to the ruins, with the stone archways and broken walls growing increasingly prominent as he pushes through the reeds toward the structure.
